response.step_by_step_log:
Identified two distinct songs based on on-screen text overlays. 
Song 1: "Tenshi ni Fureta yo!" (from K-On!). Search query: "Tenshi ni Fureta yo" K-On Japanese and English lyrics.
Song 2: "Colorful" (by ClariS). Search query: "Colorful" ClariS Japanese and English lyrics.
Lyrics for both were found successfully. Scenes were mapped according to song transitions.
response.global_summary: A 2-song musical medley performed by Hololive virtual YouTubers in a concert setting. The first song, "Tenshi ni Fureta yo!", is performed by Houshou Marine and Murasaki Shion. The second song, "Colorful", is performed by Usada Pekora and Murasaki Shion.

scenes.description: Houshou Marine and Murasaki Shion perform 'Tenshi ni Fureta yo!' on a stage with a purple, magical theme.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Demo ne, furetayo! ai subeki tenshi ni
Tadaima tte iitaku naru
Kono basho wa kawaranai yo
MEERU no jushinbako
Maru shita KARENDAA
Tobikiri no yume to deai kureta
Ongaku ni arigatou.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
But hey, we met one! A wonderful angel.
We're buddies from here on out!
It'd be fine if it stays the way it is now
But hey, we were touched!
By a lovely angel.
And sing in unison!

scenes.description: Musical interlude with stage lighting effects.
Usada Pekora and Murasaki Shion perform 'Colorful' on the same stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Itsumo no MONOKURO datta hitomi no oku no
Keshiki sutetara yumemitsuketa
Nanimo nai sekai de tsukuru kizuna wa
Tsuyoi ishi ataeta
Fureta kokoro wa kagayaita
Azayakana iro ni natte
Habataku yo, kibou nosete
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In the depths of my eyes, which had always been monochrome,
When I threw away the scenery, I found a dream.
The heart I touched became a shining, vibrant color,
And spread its wings, carrying hope.
